note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left lower leg wound site, rates 4/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Venous venous Left lower leg measures 6.3 cm x 5.7 cm x 0.2 cm.
  Wound bed: 65% slough, 35% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Venous venous Left lower leg — not improving.
Plan: Alginate dressing applied. Physician notified of wound progression.
Wound note - Leftlowerleg. Meas 6.3x5.7x0.2cm. Mod serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 48% gran, 52% slough. Periwound erythematous. Collagen dsg changed. Pt tolerated well. Dr. Oduya notified.
